name: An Automated Framework for Extracting Reachable Attack Chains from Cyber Threat Intelligence Reports
summary: arXiv:2607.19742v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) reports richly describe real-world attack processes, but their unstructured narratives cannot be directly used for...
description: arXiv:2607.19742v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) reports richly describe real-world attack processes, but their unstructured narratives cannot be directly used for automated attack-path reasoning. Existing CTI extraction methods focus on indicators, entities, or TTP labels without modeling the execution conditions and resulting states of each attack step, so the...
author: Wenbo Hou, Ning Hu, Xueping Wang, Jiahao Gu, Wenjian Luo
